Meta.title: ForkOn – Forklift Fleet Management | Reduce Costs, Increase Safety
Meta.description: 80-90% of your fleet costs are invisible. ForkOn brings transparency: Manufacturer-independent fleet management with telematics.

Hero.headline: 80–90% of your fleet costs are invisible.
Hero.subheadline: Most companies don't know the true costs of their forklift fleet. With ForkOn, you bring transparency to your intralogistics – manufacturer-independent, data-driven, and with measurable ROI.

Problems.title: Do you face these challenges?
Problems.subtitle: German companies lose millions daily due to inefficient fleet management. The biggest cost drivers often remain invisible.

problem1.title: Hidden Fleet Costs
problem1.text: The purchase price makes up only 14-20% of total costs. The rest – maintenance, energy, downtime, productivity losses – often remains invisible.

problem2.title: Accidents & Liability Risks
problem2.text: Germany records ~50 forklift accidents daily. Operations managers are personally liable – including potential prosecution for negligence.

problem3.title: Skilled Worker Shortage
problem3.text: More than half of all transport & warehouse companies cannot fill open positions. Experienced workers retire – their knowledge is lost.

problem4.title: Digital Dead Zone
problem4.text: Almost two-thirds of companies haven't automated their intralogistics. Data sits in Excel, contracts in folders – no complete picture possible.

problem5.title: Compliance Pressure
problem5.text: DGUV 308-001 was tightened in 2022. UVV inspections, driver's licenses, annual briefings – everything must be documented. Gaps = liability.

Audit.title: The 360° Intralog Audit
Audit.text: Before you optimize, you need to know where you stand. Our audit gives you an objective, manufacturer-independent analysis of your entire intralogistics – conducted by certified experts.
Audit.feature1: VDI Expert Circle 305 – Conducted by active members
Audit.feature2: 114+ checkpoints in 5 areas, according to all relevant standards
Audit.feature3: Concrete action plan – not theory, but implementable recommendations
Audit.feature4: Uncover ROI potential – customers regularly achieve 14% cost savings

Fleet.title: The Next Step: Continuous Optimization
Fleet.subtitle: After the audit, you know where potential lies. With ForkX fleet management and utilization telematics, you realize it – continuously and measurably.

software.title: ForkX Cloud Platform
software.text: All vehicles, contracts, and documents in one place – manufacturer-independent. With AI-powered invoice analysis and automated reporting.
software.feature5: Export to Excel, PDF, Google Docs

hardware.title: ForkLink Telematics
hardware.text: Affordable entry-level solution for utilization data. Simple retrofit installation, no manufacturer approval needed. The basis for all optimization decisions.

Results.title: Measurable Results from Our Customers
Results.subtitle: No promises – real numbers from real projects.

duisport.subtitle: World's largest inland port – Duisburg
duisport.quote: Thanks to RFID access control and real-time shock detection, we reduced our accident numbers by 80% in the first year.

automotive.subtitle: Competitor Replacement Case
automotive.quote: ForkOn replaced our previous provider: 12 weeks faster rollout, 98% customer satisfaction, 90% less admin effort.

LeadMagnet.title: Checklist: 10 Points Every Forklift Fleet Must Check
LeadMagnet.text: UVV, DGUV, BetrSichV – do you know if your fleet meets all requirements? Our free checklist shows you the most important checkpoints at a glance.
LeadMagnet.point3: Charging stations & charging areas per BetrSichV
LeadMagnet.formSubtitle: Receive the checklist directly via email.
LeadMagnet.note: No spam. Your data is secure. You can unsubscribe at any time.

Manufacturers.title: Manufacturer-Independent – For Every Fleet
Manufacturers.subtitle: ForkOn works with all common forklift brands. No dependency, full flexibility.

FinalCTA.title: Ready for transparent fleet costs?
FinalCTA.text: Whether you want to start with an audit or go directly into fleet management – we advise you personally and without obligation.

Footer.tagline: Europe's leading cloud telematics platform for manufacturer-independent forklift fleet management. Over 10,000 vehicles digitized.
